full_text:
Hao ? (Mengjie)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Hao ?, styledMengjie, was born in Yingchuan. Put in charge of the other mystics as he was married and behaved himself. Hao ? was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
